modules.title: Believe
modules.subtitle: Know Who You Are
modules.description: Anchor your identity in Christ and embrace who He created you to be. Discover the lies you've believed and replace them with God's truth about your worth and calling.

modules.title: Release
modules.subtitle: Let Go of What Holds You Back
modules.description: Let go of fear, doubt, past hurts, and limiting beliefs that hold you back from your calling. Experience the freedom of surrender and forgiveness.

modules.title: Activate
modules.subtitle: Step Into Action
modules.description: Step into action with confidence, using your unique gifts for God's glory. Learn to take bold steps even when you don't have all the answers.

modules.title: Visualize
modules.subtitle: See God's Vision
modules.description: See the life God has planned for you and align your steps with His vision. Dream with God and create a roadmap for your purpose.

modules.title: Endure
modules.subtitle: Finish Strong
modules.description: Build resilience and perseverance to finish the race set before you. Develop the grit and grace needed for the long journey.

completeSeries.name: The Complete BRAVE Series
completeSeries.description: Get all 5 modules plus bonus content in one comprehensive package. This is the full transformation experience.

includes.title: 5 Video Modules
includes.description: In-depth teaching sessions with practical application

includes.title: Workbook & Exercises
includes.description: Reflection prompts and actionable exercises for each module

includes.title: Community Access
includes.description: Join a private community of like-minded women

includes.title: Lifetime Access
includes.description: Return to the content whenever you need a refresh
